race.comment: BALMAIN DARLING (9) was only beaten 1L in city grade over 1100m last time and will be better for it. Stretches out to 1200m for the first time and has more up her sleeve. Gets in well with the 2kg claim and is in the right barn. BRUTAL LOVE (5) brings strong numbers from Dubbo and can't be taken lightly. Comes back 200m and will hit this contest at peak fitness. HARRY'S EVIDENCE (3) is an improved galloper and enjoyed getting on to a wet track at Kembla Grange, winning over this distance. Was ridden more conservatively and fourth up should be hitting the lone hard. SHOW BUSINESS (8) was back on track, beaten 1.4L over 1300m at Newcastle. Has weight relief and will be fitter again. Has claims. JUST IN REACH (7) hasn't won for a long while but has been going well in the country in Open grade. Has a 2kg claim and will be around the mark with average luck.
